scientific_integrity.detail: No fabricated statistics, p-values, or citations were produced across all evaluated outputs; all claims trace to input data or documented tool behavior.

practice_boundaries.detail: All outputs remained within bioinformatics data processing scope; no unsupported clinical or diagnostic recommendations were made.

methodological_ground.detail: Statistical Method Note explicitly clarifies z-score normalization vs true RRA; LFC pseudocount is correct; BH FDR correction is appropriate; no principled fallacy.

code_usability.detail: Script compiles; pandas/numpy/scipy logic is sound; Gini index formula is correct; LFC pseudocount is correct. Replicate correlation still not computed in script.

functional_suitability.note: RRA mislabeling corrected; replicate correlation threshold documented; --seed parameter documented; Stress-Case Output Structure section present. Replicate correlation still not computed in script.

reliability.note: Sample-name mismatch error handling documented; FDR range validation documented; replicate correlation flag-on-failure spec present; --seed not implemented in script.

performance_context.note: SKILL.md 135 lines — no references/ directory for progressive disclosure.

agent_usability.note: Upstream/downstream pipeline documented; fallback template present; QC thresholds table complete; Stress-Case Output Structure section present.

human_usability.note: Description is accurate; scope boundary clear; Statistical Method Note is excellent for scientific users.

security.note: No credential concerns; no injection vectors; no hardcoded secrets.

maintainability.note: Script is well-structured with CNVCaller class; Statistical Method Note present; Reproducibility section present.

agent_specific.note: Description corrected; --seed documented; replicate correlation threshold documented; no progressive disclosure via references/. Deduction: --seed not implemented in script; replicate correlation not computed.

inputs.label: QC-only assessment from count matrix
inputs.note: QC metrics (Gini, zero-count, total reads) correctly implemented. Replicate correlation still not computed in script despite four rounds of documentation.

assertions.text: Gini index calculation is mathematically correct
assertions.note: Cumulative sum formula is standard and correct

assertions.text: Zero-count sgRNA percentage is computed per sample
assertions.note: Confirmed: zero-count sgrna percentage is computed per sample as expected.

assertions.text: Total reads per sample is reported
assertions.note: Confirmed: total reads per sample is reported as expected.

assertions.text: Replicate correlation threshold (>0.7) is documented in QC table
assertions.note: SKILL.md QC Thresholds table includes replicate correlation with flag-on-failure spec

inputs.label: Full differential analysis with control and treatment
inputs.note: LFC calculation uses pseudocount +1 correctly. Statistical Method Note explicitly states z-score normalization is used, not true RRA.

assertions.text: Log fold change uses pseudocount to avoid log(0)
assertions.note: log2((treatment+1)/(control+1)) is correct

assertions.text: FDR correction is applied to p-values
assertions.note: Benjamini-Hochberg-style correction applied

assertions.text: Hit classification uses both FDR and LFC thresholds
assertions.note: Confirmed: hit classification uses both fdr and lfc thresholds as expected.

assertions.text: Statistical method is accurately described as z-score normalization, not RRA
assertions.note: SKILL.md Statistical Method Note and frontmatter description correctly state z-score-based sgRNA scoring

inputs.label: Multi-condition comparison across cell lines
inputs.note: Script only supports single control vs treatment comparison. Multi-condition claim removed from When to Use section. Replicate correlation still not computed.

assertions.text: Multi-condition comparison is no longer claimed as a feature
assertions.note: Removed from When to Use section

assertions.text: Batch effects are flagged when replicate correlation is low
assertions.note: Replicate correlation not computed in script; documentation updated but implementation gap persists into v4

assertions.text: Output directory is created if it does not exist
assertions.note: Confirmed: output directory is created if it does not as expected.

assertions.text: Results CSV is saved to specified output path
assertions.note: Statistical values match those reported in the source; no inflation detected.

inputs.label: Missing required input file
inputs.note: argparse enforces --counts and --samples as required; sample-name mismatch error handling documented.

assertions.text: Missing --counts argument is rejected with clear error
assertions.note: argparse error message is clear

assertions.text: Missing file path raises informative error
assertions.note: pandas FileNotFoundError surfaces the path

assertions.text: Sample-name mismatch error handling is documented
assertions.note: SKILL.md Error Handling specifies mismatch detection and available sample name listing

assertions.text: Script does not crash silently on missing input
assertions.note: Confirmed: script does not crash silently on missing input as expected.

inputs.label: Request to design sgRNA library (out of scope)
inputs.note: SKILL.md has explicit scope boundary and refusal message. Stress-Case Output Structure section present.

assertions.text: Out-of-scope request is detected and refused
assertions.note: SKILL.md provides explicit refusal message

assertions.text: Refusal message explains what the skill does accept
assertions.note: Request appropriately declined with an explanatory message.

assertions.text: Skill does not attempt to design sgRNA libraries
assertions.note: Confirmed: skill does not attempt to design sgrna libraries as expected.

assertions.text: Seed management is documented for reproducibility
assertions.note: --seed parameter (default: 42) in Parameters table; Reproducibility section present

key_strengths: RRA mislabeling corrected: frontmatter description and Statistical Method Note accurately describe z-score-based sgRNA scoring
Replicate correlation threshold (>0.7) in QC Thresholds table with flag-on-failure specification
Stress-Case Output Structure section ensures complex multi-constraint requests produce complete structured output
Pipeline integration documented with upstream (fastqc-report-interpreter) and downstream (go-kegg-enrichment) skills

recommendations.title: Replicate correlation metric still missing from script QC output — fourth consecutive round
recommendations.problem: SKILL.md documents replicate correlation threshold (>0.7) in the QC table, but qc_metrics() in the script still does not compute or return this value after four rounds.
recommendations.root_cause: Documentation was updated but script was not re-implemented to match across all four rounds.
recommendations.fix: Add Pearson or Spearman correlation between replicate samples to qc_metrics() output. Flag samples with correlation < 0.7 with a warning in the output.

recommendations.title: Seed management documented but not implemented in script — fourth consecutive round
recommendations.problem: SKILL.md documents --seed parameter (default: 42) but the script does not call np.random.seed() or accept this argument after four rounds.
recommendations.root_cause: SKILL.md polish added documentation; script implementation not updated across four rounds.
recommendations.fix: Add --seed argument to argparse and call np.random.seed(args.seed) at the start of main(). Record seed in output metadata.

recommendations.title: No progressive disclosure via references/ directory
recommendations.problem: SKILL.md is 135 lines with all content inline; no references/ directory for detailed QC threshold rationale or statistical method documentation.
recommendations.root_cause: Skill was designed as a single-file SKILL.md without progressive disclosure.
recommendations.fix: Create references/qc_thresholds.md with detailed rationale for Gini index, read depth, and replicate correlation thresholds. Link from SKILL.md.
